title: NTA All India Sainik Schools AISSEE Result 2026
description: NTA All India Sainik Schools AISSEE 2026 Result Post Update Date: 27-02-2026 Short Description: NTA AISSEE 2026 Result : The All India Sainik Schools Entrance Examination (AISSEE) 2026 is scheduled for January 18, 2026 . The Advance Intimation of Examination City has been released January 6, 2026, on the official NTA website, allowing candidates to check their allotted exam city. Admit cards for Class 6 and Class 9 are expected to be released in the second week of January 2026 and can be down...
